heading.description: Comparison item heading accepted by the current smart_layout generation path.

description.description: Specific explanatory sentence for the comparison item.
description.example: This option emphasizes the first side of the comparison clearly.

icon_name.description: Optional Remix Icon class accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.

items.heading: Option A
items.description: This option emphasizes the first side of the comparison clearly.

items.heading: Option B
items.description: This option explains the second side with a distinct teaching focus.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items must use fields accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
